scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "pnpm run dev:api" "pnpm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:mock: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "pnpm run dev:api:mock" "pnpm run dev:web"
scripts.check: uv run ruff format --check . && uv run ruff check . && uv run ty check && cd frontend && pnpm check
